    Serialized Form

    • Package <Unnamed>

      • Class xLifeModel

        class xLifeModel extends JPanel implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • cellSize
            int cellSize
            Size of each cell in pixels
          • cols
            int cols
            Number of columns in the grid
          • grid
            char[][] grid
            2D grid that represents the map
          • humanList
            ArrayList<xHuman> humanList
            List of humans in the game
          • humanPoint
            int humanPoint
            Points earned by humans
          • lastMove
            int lastMove
            Maximum number of moves allowed for check end game
          • moves
            int moves
            Number of moves
          • rows
            int rows
            Number of rows in the grid
          • safeCount
            int safeCount
            Number of safe zones
          • safeZoneList
            ArrayList<Point> safeZoneList
            List of safe zone positions
          • soldierList
            ArrayList<xSoldier> soldierList
            List of soldiers in the game
          • weaponList
            ArrayList<Point> weaponList
            List of weapon positions

            List of zombies in the game
